response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple domains and languages, his background does not align closely with the Principal Performance Architect role, which requires deep expertise in SoC modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, and performance analysis for deep-learning workloads. His resume showcases general software engineering and web/mobile development, with no clear evidence of experience in hardware-software co-design, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or GPU workload optimization.
strengths: Strong software engineering and full-stack development experience across multiple languages
Proven ability to design and maintain scalable systems and infrastructure
Experience with performance optimization in software applications
concerns: Lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware optimization
No evident background in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Does not meet the required educational or experience qualifications for the Principal level role

key_factors.factor: Deep-learning or GPU workload optimization expertise
Educational qualifications for Principal level role
